title: Spicy Flaky Dutch Butter Tart
description: A light, flaky Dutch butter tart with a spicy twist, featuring peach juice for tang, crafted with a whisked batter for perfect layers, all FODMAP-friendly for sensitive palates.
instructions: Preheat oven to 200°C (400°F). Grease a mini tart tin and set aside.
In a bowl whisk flour, baking powder, and salt. Cut in cold butter with a pastry cutter until crumbs form.
Add sugar and whisk until mixture resembles fine crumbs.
Stir in egg and peach juice until a dough forms; use a fork and whisk to keep it light.
Fold in vanilla extract and chili flakes, mixing just until incorporated.
Divide dough evenly among 8 tart shells, pressing firmly into the bottom and up the sides.
Bake in the preheated oven for 12–14 minutes or until golden and puffed.
Remove from oven and let cool in the tin for 5 minutes.
Transfer tartlets to a wire rack to cool completely.
Serve warm or at room temperature, optionally dusted with extra chili flakes for extra heat.
